role_scope: One bounded A2 consolidation pass that freezes the live executable entropy branch around correlation_polarity, preserving the broad executable head/floor split and the narrow standalone failure without reopening direct structure landing.
operator_steps: Stay A2-only. Do not perform A1 stripped translation or cartridge packaging in this pass.
Use the completed helper-control audit as the boundary: compound bridge heads stay proposal-side and the executable floor remains colder-witness-first.
Confirm whether the live broad executable branch is still honestly centered on correlation_polarity with correlation as companion floor.
If the broad executable branch remains valid, hand off the next control move to branch-budget / merge tightening and stop fail-closed.
prompt_to_send: Run one bounded A2 colder-witness executable consolidation pass for correlation_polarity. Use the completed helper-control audit plus the current executable-entrypoint and live family surfaces to confirm the broad executable head/floor split, preserve the narrow standalone failure, and write one explicit audit note without reopening direct structure landing.
stop_rule: Stop after one bounded A2 colder-witness executable consolidation pass.
